story.tasks:
- Task 1: Prisma schema'ya Permission entity ekle (AC: 3.3.1) - Subtask 1.1: prisma/schema-postgres.prisma dosyasını aç - Subtask 1.2: Permission model ekle (id, module, action, description, createdAt) - Subtask 1.3: Unique constraint ekle: @@unique([module, action]) - Subtask 1.4: Index ekle: @@index([module]) - Subtask 1.5: Relations tanımla: rolePermissions RolePermission[], userPermissions UserPermission[] - Subtask 1.6: Placeholder junction models ekle (RolePermission, UserPermission)
- Task 2: Migration oluştur ve uygula (AC: 3.3.4) - Subtask 2.1: npx prisma migrate dev --name add-permission-entity komutu çalıştır - Subtask 2.2: Migration dosyasını incele ve doğrula - Subtask 2.3: Migration'ı apply et (test database'de) - Subtask 2.4: Prisma Client'ı regenerate et
- Task 3: ActionEnum oluştur (AC: 3.3.3) - Subtask 3.1: src/common/enums/action.enum.ts dosyası oluştur - Subtask 3.2: ActionEnum tanımla: CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE - Subtask 3.3: Export et - Subtask 3.4: index.ts dosyası oluştur (barrel export)
- Task 4: PERMISSIONS constant oluştur (AC: 3.3.2) - Subtask 4.1: src/modules/permissions/ klasörü oluştur - Subtask 4.2: src/modules/permissions/constants/ klasörü oluştur - Subtask 4.3: permissions.constant.ts dosyası oluştur - Subtask 4.4: PERMISSIONS object tanımla (USERS, PERMISSIONS, FILES) - Subtask 4.5: Her module için actions tanımla - Subtask 4.6: 'as const' ile type-safe yap - Subtask 4.7: Export et - Subtask 4.8: index.ts dosyası oluştur
- Task 5: Story 3.2 stub constants'ını güncelle (AC: 3.3.5) - Subtask 5.1: Story 3.2'deki tüm dosyaları tara - Subtask 5.2: Geçici PERMISSIONS tanımlarını kaldır - Subtask 5.3: Yeni PERMISSIONS constant'ını import et - Subtask 5.4: ActionEnum'u import et ve kullan
- Task 6: PermissionsModule oluştur (AC: 3.3.2) - Subtask 6.1: permissions.module.ts dosyası oluştur - Subtask 6.2: PermissionsModule sınıfı oluştur - Subtask 6.3: AuthorizationService'i providers ve exports'a ekle - Subtask 6.4: PrismaModule'ü imports'a ekle
- Task 7: Story 3.2 entegrasyonunu doğrula (AC: 3.3.5) - Subtask 7.1: UsersController decorator'larını doğrula - Subtask 7.2: PermissionsGuard çalışmasını doğrula - Subtask 7.3: Testlerin geçtiğini doğrula - Subtask 7.4: TypeScript derlemesini doğrula
- Task 8: E2E testleri çalıştır (AC: 3.3.1, 3.3.5) - Subtask 8.1: Test database'i temizle - Subtask 8.2: E2E testleri çalıştır - Subtask 8.3: Permission check flow'u doğrula - Subtask 8.4: Hata durumlarını doğrula

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
AC-3.3.1: Permission entity Prisma schema'ya eklenmiş - Fields: id (UUID), module (String), action (String), description (String?, optional), createdAt (DateTime) - Unique constraint on [module, action] - Index on [module] - Relations: rolePermissions[], userPermissions[]
AC-3.3.2: PERMISSIONS constant tanımlanmış - Location: src/modules/permissions/constants/permissions.constant.ts - Object structure: PERMISSIONS.{MODULE}.{ACTION} - Format: 'MODULE.ACTION' (e.g., 'USERS.CREATE') - Modules: USERS, PERMISSIONS, FILES (minimum) - Actions: CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE (minimum) - Type-safe constant (as const) - Export edilmiş ve kullanılabilir
AC-3.3.3: ActionEnum oluşturulmuş - Location: src/common/enums/action.enum.ts - Enum values: CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE - @Permission decorator'da kullanılabilir - Type-safe enum yapısı
AC-3.3.4: Prisma migration oluşturulmuş - Migration dosyası PostgreSQL için generate edilmiş - Migration başarıyla çalıştırılabilir - Unique constraint ve index'ler dahil
AC-3.3.5: Story 3.2'deki stub constants güncellendi - Geçici PERMISSIONS constants'ları replace edildi - Tüm permission referansları yeni constant kullanıyor - ActionEnum tüm decorator'larda kullanılıyor

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.section: Data Models and Contracts - Permission Entity
doc.snippet: Permission entity with fields: id (UUID), module (String), action (String), description (optional), createdAt. Unique constraint on [module, action]. Index on [module]. Relations: rolePermissions[], userPermissions[].

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: PERMISSIONS constant structure: PERMISSIONS.{MODULE}.{ACTION} format. Type-safe with 'as const'. Modules: USERS, PERMISSIONS, FILES. Actions: CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Hybrid Enum + DB permission system: PERMISSIONS constant (code) + Permission entity (database). Module-based organization for clear permission boundaries. Dev-to-DB sync via script (Story 3.7).

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Permission System: Hybrid Enum + DB approach with module.action format. Type safety + runtime flexibility + dev sync capability.

doc.title: Epics Document
doc.snippet: Create Permission entity in Prisma schema. Define PERMISSIONS constant object with MODULE.ACTION format. Create ActionEnum with CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE values.

doc.title: Story 3.2: Admin User CRUD
doc.snippet: PERMISSIONS constant stub, ActionEnum stub, AuthorizationService stub already created in Story 3.2. Story 3.3 moves these to official locations and adds full PERMISSIONS object with USERS, PERMISSIONS, FILES modules.

artifact.reason: Permission entity ALREADY EXISTS in schema. Has all required fields: id, module, action, description, createdAt. Unique constraint and index already defined. Relations to UserPermission and RolePermission already set up.
Junction table for user-specific permission assignments. Already exists with proper relations and indexes.
Junction table for role-based permission assignments. Already exists with proper relations.
PERMISSIONS constant STUB from Story 3.2. Currently only has USERS module. Story 3.3 needs to ADD: PERMISSIONS and FILES modules to complete minimum requirement.
ActionEnum ALREADY EXISTS from Story 3.2. Already has CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE values. No changes needed, already in correct location.
@Permission decorator from Story 3.2. Uses ActionEnum and sets metadata for PermissionsGuard. No changes needed for Story 3.3.
PermissionsGuard from Story 3.2. Enforces permission-based authorization. Calls AuthorizationService.hasPermission(). No changes needed for Story 3.3.
Authorization service STUB from Story 3.2. Currently returns TRUE for all checks. Full implementation in Story 3.5. No changes needed for Story 3.3.
PermissionsModule from Story 3.2. Exports AuthorizationService. No changes needed for Story 3.3.
UsersController uses @Permission decorator with ActionEnum. Example: @Permission('USERS', ActionEnum.VIEW). Uses constants from permissions.constant.ts. No import path changes needed.

node.usage: Type-safe database access for Permission entity

story-context.constraints: - Type-safe constants: Use 'as const' for PERMISSIONS object to enable TypeScript type inference - Module-based organization: PERMISSIONS.{MODULE}.{ACTION} format (e.g., PERMISSIONS.USERS.CREATE = 'USERS.CREATE') - Permission entity ALREADY EXISTS in schema - no schema changes needed - PERMISSIONS constant stub exists with USERS module only - ADD PERMISSIONS and FILES modules - ActionEnum ALREADY COMPLETE - no changes needed - Maintain backward compatibility with Story 3.2 decorator usage: @Permission('USERS', ActionEnum.CREATE) - All paths must be project-relative (no absolute paths in code) - Export pattern: Use index.ts barrel exports for clean imports - No breaking changes to existing permission guard infrastructure

tests.standards:
Story 3.3 is infrastructure setup - no unit tests required for constants/enums. Integration tests validate: 1. Prisma schema: Migration applies successfully, unique constraints work 2. PERMISSIONS constant: TypeScript compilation succeeds, type inference works 3. Story 3.2 integration: Existing E2E tests pass with updated constants
Testing frameworks (from Epic 2): - Jest for unit/integration tests - Supertest for E2E tests - Test database for integration tests - Coverage target: 80% overall (N/A for Story 3.3 - pure infrastructure)
tests.locations: test/ (E2E tests from Story 3.2 - should still pass) test/users-admin.e2e-spec.ts (admin CRUD E2E tests) src/modules/users/controllers/users.controller.spec.ts (unit tests) src/modules/permissions/services/authorization.service.spec.ts (unit tests)
tests.ideas: - AC-3.3.1: Verify Permission entity exists in schema with correct fields and constraints - AC-3.3.2: Verify PERMISSIONS constant includes USERS, PERMISSIONS, FILES modules - AC-3.3.3: Verify ActionEnum exists with CREATE, VIEW, UPDATE, DELETE values - AC-3.3.4: Run migration (if needed) and verify it applies successfully - AC-3.3.5: Run Story 3.2 E2E tests to verify integration (POST /users with permission should work) - Integration test: Verify TypeScript compilation succeeds with new constants - Integration test: Verify @Permission decorator works with new PERMISSIONS constant
